mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, order_number, total_price, order_status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, member_id, order_number, total_price, order_status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE order_number = #{orderNumber}
SELECT id, member_id, order_number, total_price, order_status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (member_id, order_number, total_price, order_status, shipping_address, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{orderNumber}, #{totalPrice}, #{orderStatus}, #{shippingAddress}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, price, quantity, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
